title: CLI Recorder Recipe
description: Declarative description of a CLI session for the feinschnitt record command to drive in tmux+asciinema.

title.description: Stored in cast metadata; used as scene title in Remotion.

command.description: The CLI binary to spawn inside tmux (e.g. 'claude', 'bash', 'kubectl').

profile.description: Preset of behaviors loaded from cli-recorder/profiles/<profile>.toml. Recipe fields override profile fields.

idle_time_limit.description: asciinema rec metadata cap for any single pause at playback time.

wait_for_banner.description: Override profile's banner string. Set to empty to skip banner wait when starting in a shell that later launches the target.

idle_stable_secs.description: Override profile's idle-stable threshold. Bigger = more patient (claude responses); smaller = snappier (plain shell).

graceful_exit.description: Override profile's graceful_exit. Set false when the recipe ends with its own explicit exit step.

id.description: Stable identifier (used as key in scene-index.json). Lowercase, no spaces.

label.description: Human-readable. Becomes a chapter marker / VO beat title.

text.description: What to type. Sent character-by-character at typing_wpm, then Enter.

dismiss_key.description: Optional named tmux key (e.g. 'Escape') sent after the prompt settles. Use for modal dialogs that block subsequent input (Claude /help, /status, /cost).

pause_before.description: Seconds to wait after Claude is idle before typing this prompt.

pattern.description: Regex matched against pane content. Step blocks until matched.

duration.description: Seconds to sleep mid-recording. Useful for visual breathing room.
